reviews.review_description: How do I change which side of the plate I’m batting on
Keep up the work can y’all add more bats like metal bats

I think this game has potential and to make this game better some things to add is maybe that when u go into the practice I’m spawned in front of the plate so I walk within arms reach of a wall or out of my boundary almost every time so when we spawn in it should spawn me already in the betters box I chose and also there should be home run derby’s also the tracking was making my bat fling like 5 feet away  sometimes this tracking makes me miss also when the bat is held it should be like u can grip it however in practice we should be able to practice all the positions on the field and there should be where you can practice umping with the game also add softball and add a little league mode where the pitch can go down to 20 mph and there should be a vibrate in the controllers when I hit and make sure that if u add the positions the practice in the field hopefully the glove can catch the ball anyways I think this game has great potential (this is based off me playing once)

reviews.review_title: An Underdog in the Baseball Space
reviews.review_description:
The app serves two purposes at the same time.

You can have a fun time just playing the game or use the app for actually training yourself as a baseball batter. 

The game gives a lot of insights into each of the shots played.
Along with a visual representation of how you played the last shot so you can improve overtime. The game also has surprisingly good physics for the price and the stage its at.

Though it seems in development. The game is exciting, realistic and exhilarating. 

Im satisfied with my purchase :)
Really fun game! The physics feel super realistic, and I love how you can make custom pitches and playlists. Lots of potential to become a great game.

I've used many baseball apps before, this one surely has one of the best physics. I surely feel it will work even better with the bat accessory. Will buy one and update my review based on experience. Excellent work devs!
This game has very realistic physics which makes it feel more real than most of the other games I have tried till now.

reviews.review_title: Game is in development Phase I believe
reviews.review_description: So far i have experienced realistic physics. The way it feels after hitting the ball it is somewhat realistic. although i am very bad at hitting things.

The game is awesome but the hand tracking when you hit shows your under it when I watch it go right through the middle of the bat I love how you can change the pitch spot and speed that makes it better for training and timing but overall great game

developer_response.body: Thanks KingCG. We will fix the issue very soon.

reviews.review_description:
Its a decent game but , it could have a fielding mode and a base running mode. But overall its a pretty good game.
 ￼
This game has a lot of potential definitely worth a try. I really liked the detailed stats and replay settings. Love it
